creator: exil@sasurai.se
text:
Hi!

Indeed, I had firefox2 installed. It was apparantly installed as
a dependency of something or other, but that seems no longer to
be the case. 

Removing firefox2 solved the matter elegantly. I do feel slightly
silly now :)

Thanks for the help!

Case closed  ;)

 Regards,
   Kenneth Lind
